headline: Victoria's Secret Q4 Earnings Beat Estimates, Comparable Sales Rise 8%
summary: VSCO posts strong Q4 results as comparable sales rose 8%, driving earnings and revenue above expectations.

raw.headline: Victoria's Secret Q4 Earnings Beat Estimates, Comparable Sales Rise 8%
raw.summary: VSCO posts strong Q4 results as comparable sales rose 8%, driving earnings and revenue above expectations.

headline: BURL Stock Up 7% After Q4 Earnings Beat Estimates & Comps Up Y/Y
summary: Burlington Stores jumps 7% after Q4 earnings and revenues top estimates, due to 4% comps growth and stronger margins during the holiday quarter.
